Note: BAD: Time is NULL -> feed_time becomes NULL
BAD: Amount is NULL -> amount_ml becomes NULL
BAD: Baby ID is NULL -> defaults to baby_id=1 in FormulaDataEntity
BAD: ID is NULL -> source_id auto-generated in FormulaDataEntity
BAD: wrong datetime format -> feed_time becomes NULL
BAD: amount is not numeric -> amount_ml becomes NULL
BAD: impossible date -> feed_time becomes NULL
